executiveSummary: Audit completed on https://craft.do/. Overall score 72/100. Key opportunities center on accessibility review, ux friction analysis, color psychology analysis.
strengths: Brand and Design Identity Evaluation: Visual identity appears focused across typography and component styling.
Visual Hierarchy Analysis: Hierarchy strength is evaluated from heading structure density, card segmentation, and above-the-fold clarity.
Typography Analysis: Typography scale shows 6 frequent font-size steps in desktop mode.
Mobile Responsiveness Review: Responsiveness is measured by mobile viewport rendering behavior and overflow indicators.
weaknesses: Color Psychology Analysis: Top text colors: rgb(0, 135, 255) (6).
Accessibility Review: Images without useful alt text: 7.
Conversion Optimization Review: Primary CTA opportunities detected: 16.
prioritizedRecommendations: Add meaningful alt text for informative images and empty alt for decorative assets.
Remove dead-end click targets and ensure every interaction yields visible feedback.
Codify one high-attention CTA hue and reserve it for conversion-critical actions.
Align hero CTA, mid-page CTA, and footer CTA messaging to one conversion path.
Normalize hover, focus, and pressed states across all interactive controls.
Define consistent max-widths and gutter scales per breakpoint tier.

sections.title: Brand and Design Identity Evaluation
sections.summary: Visual identity appears focused across typography and component styling.
findings: Detected 3 dominant font families in desktop rendering.
Top textual color tokens show 1 recurring values.
Navigation appears 2 time(s), indicating multiple navigation patterns.
recommendations: Limit production typography to 2-3 font families with explicit role assignments.
Map recurring color tokens into a semantic design-token set (text, surface, action, status).

sections.title: Visual Hierarchy Analysis
sections.summary: Hierarchy strength is evaluated from heading structure density, card segmentation, and above-the-fold clarity.
recommendations: Ensure the first viewport communicates one dominant value proposition and one primary CTA.
Reduce competing visual weights in parallel content blocks.

sections.title: Typography Analysis
sections.summary: Typography scale shows 6 frequent font-size steps in desktop mode.
findings: Most common families: UntitledSansFont, "UntitledSansFont Fallback", apple-system, InterFont, "InterFont Fallback", BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "sans-serif" (297) | apple-system, InterFont, "InterFont Fallback", BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "sans-serif" (99) | UntitledSerifFont, "UntitledSerifFont Fallback", apple-system-ui-serif, ui-serif, Georgia, "serif" (81).
recommendations: Constrain heading/body/caption scale into a documented modular ratio.
Enforce readable body line length and minimum line-height for dense sections.

sections.title: Color Psychology Analysis
sections.summary: Detected 1 recurring text color values; palette cohesion influences trust and conversion confidence.
findings: Animation-intense nodes: 10, which can alter perceived visual calmness.
recommendations: Codify one high-attention CTA hue and reserve it for conversion-critical actions.
Audit contrast for secondary text against all major surface colors.

sections.title: Layout and Grid Analysis
sections.summary: Layout structure uses 12 grid and 510 flex containers in sampled nodes.
recommendations: Define consistent max-widths and gutter scales per breakpoint tier.
Use grid for macro-layout and flex for local alignment to improve predictability.

sections.title: Accessibility Review
sections.summary: Accessibility quality is scored using image alt coverage and interactive control labeling checks.
recommendations: Add meaningful alt text for informative images and empty alt for decorative assets.
Ensure every interactive control has visible or aria-based labeling.

sections.title: Mobile Responsiveness Review
sections.summary: Responsiveness is measured by mobile viewport rendering behavior and overflow indicators.
recommendations: Prioritize tap targets, spacing rhythm, and vertical content flow in mobile-first QA.
Validate all CTAs and forms in narrow viewport states.

sections.title: Interaction Design Review
sections.summary: Detected 16 interactive controls and 10 animated nodes.
recommendations: Normalize hover, focus, and pressed states across all interactive controls.
Ensure motion supports feedback clarity without delaying user intent.

sections.title: Conversion Optimization Review
sections.summary: Conversion language indicators found: 2; trust indicators found: 3.
recommendations: Align hero CTA, mid-page CTA, and footer CTA messaging to one conversion path.
Strengthen social proof and risk-reversal messaging near commitment actions.

sections.title: UX Friction Analysis
sections.summary: Friction score combines accessibility defects, overflow behavior, and interaction dead-ends.
findings: Mobile overflow status: no overflow detected.
recommendations: Remove dead-end click targets and ensure every interaction yields visible feedback.
Resolve horizontal overflow and spacing collisions in narrow breakpoints.

sections.title: Consistency and Component-System Maturity
sections.summary: Component maturity is inferred from repeated card/button patterns and cross-section visual reuse.
recommendations: Convert repeated UI blocks into standardized component variants with token-driven theming.
Audit variant sprawl and remove one-off button/card treatments.

sections.title: Performance Perception and Modernity Alignment
sections.summary: Perceived performance is influenced by motion load, content density, and structural modern UI patterns.
recommendations: Use progressive reveal only where it supports comprehension, not decoration.
Balance visual modernity with motion restraint and predictable loading states.

sections.title: Competitive-Quality Perception
sections.summary: Competitive quality is inferred from modern layout patterns, hierarchy clarity, and conversion confidence.
recommendations: Benchmark hero clarity and CTA confidence against category leaders quarterly.
Prioritize visual differentiation in key conversion zones without sacrificing usability.

colorPaletteScheme.summary: Detected 1 dominant text colors, 3 surface colors, and 0 accent/border colors.

desktop.title: Craft — Productivity App for Notes, Tasks, and Docs
desktop.description: A free notes and productivity app that follows you across all your devices. Premium features available.

mobile.title: Craft — Productivity App for Notes, Tasks, and Docs
mobile.description: A free notes and productivity app that follows you across all your devices. Premium features available.
